title: Thematic reviews of children not in school in local areas
body: "The Area SEND inspection system includes thematic visits to a small number of areas each year to investigate a particular aspect of the special educational needs and/or disabilities (SEND) system in depth.  This guidance explains how Ofsted and the Care Quality Commission (CQC) will conduct the 2025 visits, which will focus on children not in school.   The report following these thematic visits is now published. Read the report: The experiences of children with SEND who are not in school: a thematic review   "
